programs.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programs.desc: For Keith Morrison, this case stands out as an unusual mystery; the crime seemed arbitrary with no apparent motive; there was a confession which might have ended the investigation but that was only the beginning.

programs.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programs.desc: A loving grandmother from a traveling community is found brutally murdered, shocking all; investigators soon uncover a web of lies, identity theft and millions in insurance fraud that point to who killed this sweet old lady.

programs.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programs.desc: A single mother becomes a murder victim while living a double life; a web of deception, sex and murder sends detectives on a multi-year hunt to figure out who could have murdered her.

programs.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programs.desc: A man is found dead in the shower, and police have only two suspects, but to figure out who killed him and why, is not as cut and dry as it may seem.

programs.title: The Real Murders of Atlanta
programs.desc: The abduction and murder of a pregnant woman and her fiancé from their Decatur home sends shockwaves throughout Atlanta; ransom calls and voicemails turn into digital breadcrumbs for investigators to track the killers down.

programs.title: The Real Murders of Atlanta
programs.desc: Twin daughters find their mother stabbed to death in their quaint suburban home, and the pressure for detectives to deliver justice is on; but when the shocking truth behind the murder comes out, the Atlanta community is left stunned and heartbroken.
